statement: agent-enterprise's supply-chain/secret/SBOM defence depends on external scanners (semgrep, grype, syft, detect-secrets) that it orchestrates but does not bundle, version-own, or guarantee — so the 'fail-closed' guarantee is only as strong as tools it neither ships nor controls, and an open decision still debates whether to degrade-gracefully when a scanner is absent.

evidence.quote: Includes... Dependabot scanning, pinned dependencies with cryptographic hashes, Ed25519 signing + manifest verification.

falsifier: Show the build pins and vendors the scanner toolchain (locked versions, hermetic execution) AND fails closed when any scanner is missing — resolve the open decision in favour of hard-fail and prove it in CI.
